titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the University Relations tape recordings and movie films, 1954-1985.
University Relations tape recordings and movie films
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

profiledesc.creation: Finding aid encoded by RMC Staff, September 2013

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the University Relations Tape Recordings And Movie Films,1954-1985.
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle: University Relations tape recordings and movie films,

origination.label: Creator:
origination.corpname: Cornell University. University Relations. Radio - Television - Film Office.

did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Audio tapes of radio programs and campus events; radio production logs, 1972-1981; and movie films. Also, video tapes of campus events.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Audio tapes of radio programs and campus events; radio production logs, 1972-1981; and movie films. Also, video tapes of campus events.

did.unittitle: A list of the tapes can be found here: http://rmc.library.cornell.edu/EAD/pdf_guides/Tape_Recording_Inventory.pdf

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Restricted in part to permission of office of origin.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: University Relations, Radio-Television-Film Office tape recordings, #4-3-875. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
